name: sales-page
description: Write a long-form, conversion-focused sales page with a power headline, problem agitation, benefit-driven copy, testimonial placeholders, objection-handling FAQ, and a strong CTA.
input_description: Product or service name, target customer, core problem solved, top 3-5 benefits, price point, and any known objections.
output_description: Complete long-form sales page in Markdown with all major sections: hero, problem, solution, benefits, social proof, FAQ, and CTA block.
